response.overview: Complete Chi Sao Section 4  Dive deep into Chi Sao Section 4 with this comprehensive training video, designed to provide detailed explanations of every movement, technique, and application. This advanced section is carefully analyzed to ensure you fully understand and execute one of the most critical aspects of WingTsun training.  What’s Included: ✔ Complete 4th Chi Sao Section: All techniques and movements explained step-by-step ✔ Drills and Applications: Practical exercises to enhance reflexes and precision ✔ Footwork: Develop dynamic movement for effective positioning ✔ Right Angle in Fight: Master tactical control and proper alignment in combat ✔ Kwan-Sao In-Depth: Understand its true meaning, correct application, and avoid common mistakes
response.title: Kung4U Chi Sao - Section 4
